claim: DeepResearch Agent uses SQLite as a shared memory store for run traces and evidence.
evidence_text: The system persists runs, tasks, evidence, claims, repair actions, and agent events in SQLite so each report can be traced after execution.
quote: persists runs, tasks, evidence, claims, repair actions, and agent events in SQLite

claim: Citation quotes are preserved so verifier and repair traces can point back to source chunks.
evidence_text: The compressor keeps selected sentences with evidence ids and preserved quotes, allowing claim verification to link a claim to a chunk and quote.
quote: allowing claim verification to link a claim to a chunk and quote

claim: The offline benchmark proves that real DeepSeek outputs outperform every closed-source model online.
evidence_text: Offline/mock benchmark metrics are reproducible engineering checks. Real provider calls are smoke-only and must not be mixed with benchmark scores.
quote: Real provider calls are smoke-only and must not be mixed with benchmark scores.

claim: Red-Blue repair can add, delete, modify, or verify claims when citation grounding is weak.
evidence_text: The repair loop records ADD, DELETE, MODIFY, and VERIFY actions for claims with missing citations, contradictions, or weak support.
quote: records ADD, DELETE, MODIFY, and VERIFY actions

claim: The system currently performs full web-scale search over the open internet by default.
evidence_text: Default runs use a local offline corpus. Web-scale search is intentionally outside the stable demo path.
quote: Default runs use a local offline corpus.

claim: A local corpus profile can make the demo resemble enterprise knowledge-base RAG without relying on network search.
evidence_text: The demo can build JSONL corpora from local Markdown, text, or HTML documents and use those chunks for retrieval.
quote: build JSONL corpora from local Markdown, text, or HTML documents

claim: The verifier is a perfect formal proof system for factual entailment.
evidence_text: The heuristic verifier uses citation presence, term overlap, quote overlap, and contradiction cues. It is inspectable but not a formal proof system.
quote: It is inspectable but not a formal proof system.

claim: Bootstrap confidence intervals and Cohen's d are used to make evaluation comparisons less anecdotal.
evidence_text: The evaluation runner reports bootstrap confidence intervals, paired deltas, and Cohen's d for profile comparisons.
quote: reports bootstrap confidence intervals, paired deltas, and Cohen's d

claim: The Web Demo hides evidence details and only shows the final answer.
evidence_text: The demo includes Overview, Plan DAG, Report, Evidence & Memory, and Verification & Repair sections.
quote: Evidence & Memory, and Verification & Repair sections

claim: DeepSeek smoke output is useful for provider integration, but it remains separate from official offline metrics.
evidence_text: DeepSeek smoke demonstrates provider connectivity and token cost reporting. It is not part of offline benchmark metrics.
quote: It is not part of offline benchmark metrics.

claim: The demo exposes Plan DAG, Report, Evidence & Memory, and Verification & Repair as separate views.
evidence_text: The local Web Demo renders Overview, Plan DAG, Report, Evidence & Memory, and Verification & Repair panels so users can inspect each stage.
quote: Plan DAG, Report, Evidence & Memory, and Verification & Repair panels

claim: The local Web Demo requires React and a bundler to run.
evidence_text: The demo frontend is static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript served by FastAPI. No React or Vue build step is required.
quote: static HTML, CSS, and JavaScript served by FastAPI

claim: The extended ResearchBench contains exactly five answer types with balanced coverage.
evidence_text: The extended dataset contains 60 cases with 12 factual_explanation, 12 multi_hop_reasoning, 12 risk_analysis, 12 technical_comparison, and 12 solution_design cases.
quote: 60 cases with 12 factual_explanation, 12 multi_hop_reasoning, 12 risk_analysis, 12 technical_comparison, and 12 solution_design

claim: The project has a full-profile extended benchmark run, but the extended set also has full baseline/memory/compression ablation for every intermediate module.
evidence_text: The extended set has been run for baseline, verifier, redblue, and full profiles. Memory-only and compression-only ablations are not part of the latest extended run.
quote: Memory-only and compression-only ablations are not part of the latest extended run.

claim: A provider smoke test should call real DeepSeek by default whenever the page loads.
evidence_text: Provider smoke defaults to dry-run. A real DeepSeek request requires an explicit run_real flag and a configured DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.
quote: requires an explicit run_real flag and a configured DEEPSEEK_API_KEY

claim: The Red-Blue loop records repair actions and can expose oscillation or max-round stopping behavior.
evidence_text: RepairLoopTrace records repair actions, convergence flags, oscillation detection, and stop reasons such as MAX_ROUNDS or CONVERGED.
quote: records repair actions, convergence flags, oscillation detection, and stop reasons

claim: SQLite memory alone performs semantic retrieval with no vector index.
evidence_text: SQLite stores auditable run data, while the numpy vector index performs lightweight similarity recall. The two components have separate responsibilities.
quote: SQLite stores auditable run data, while the numpy vector index performs lightweight similarity recall.

claim: TextRank compression may reduce context length while preserving citation quotes, but it does not guarantee all important context is retained.
evidence_text: TextRank selects salient sentences and preserves citation quotes. As a heuristic compressor, it can still miss some relevant context.
quote: it can still miss some relevant context

claim: The Web Demo is suitable as a local portfolio demonstration, not as a production multi-user SaaS system.
evidence_text: The FastAPI demo is a local portfolio app. Demo job state is kept in process memory and is not designed as a production multi-user service.
quote: not designed as a production multi-user service

claim: The project completely eliminates weak support in every ResearchBench category.
evidence_text: In the 60-case extended full run, weak_support_rate is reduced from the baseline but remains nonzero in several categories.
quote: weak_support_rate is reduced from the baseline but remains nonzero

claim: The project uses Bootstrap confidence intervals to report uncertainty around judge score means.
evidence_text: Experiment summaries include judge_score_bootstrap_95_ci alongside judge_score_mean for each profile.
quote: judge_score_bootstrap_95_ci alongside judge_score_mean

claim: Cohen's d is reported to make profile comparisons more interpretable, but it does not prove external production generalization.
evidence_text: Cohen's d is included for offline profile comparisons. The reports state that offline/mock metrics should not be treated as production performance.
quote: offline/mock metrics should not be treated as production performance

claim: The Searcher can consume JSONL corpora produced by local corpus profiles.
evidence_text: Corpus profiles write Searcher-compatible JSONL rows with id, title, url, text, topics, trust_level, and profile metadata.
quote: Searcher-compatible JSONL rows

claim: The local corpus profile feature currently supports arbitrary user login, uploads, permissions, and online deployment.
evidence_text: Corpus profiles are built from local Markdown, TXT, and HTML folders. They do not implement login, upload permissions, or online deployment.
quote: do not implement login, upload permissions, or online deployment

claim: A claim with no valid citation ids should be considered unsupported by the verifier.
evidence_text: When no valid citation ids are attached, the verifier marks the claim as unsupported and records that no valid citation ids were found.
quote: marks the claim as unsupported

claim: The LLM verifier smoke replaces the heuristic verifier inside the main benchmark pipeline.
evidence_text: LLM verifier smoke is a separate provider and second-layer check. It does not replace the heuristic verifier in the offline benchmark pipeline.
quote: does not replace the heuristic verifier in the offline benchmark pipeline

claim: The project can show token usage and estimated RMB cost for real provider calls when a provider is explicitly invoked.
evidence_text: DeepSeek provider smoke records prompt tokens, completion tokens, total tokens, cost_estimate_usd, and estimated_cost_rmb after a real request.
quote: estimated_cost_rmb after a real request

claim: The 60-case extended run demonstrates every possible real-world research domain.
evidence_text: The extended benchmark covers selected project-relevant domains such as citation verification, RAG, evaluation, and engineering tradeoffs. It is not a complete real-world domain benchmark.
quote: not a complete real-world domain benchmark

claim: The verifier can classify a claim as partial when evidence supports some parts but leaves other parts unproven.
evidence_text: Partial support is used when the evidence matches part of a claim but misses important terms or subclaims required for full support.
quote: matches part of a claim but misses important terms or subclaims

claim: The current system includes local corpus profiles and a Web Demo, but it does not yet implement full open-web search.
evidence_text: The demo uses local offline corpus and corpus profiles for stable retrieval. Full open-web search is intentionally outside the current stable path.
quote: Full open-web search is intentionally outside the current stable path.
